name: MESHWORKS
message: MESHWORKSMANUFACTURERS OF STEEL WIRE WELDED MESH FOR INDUSTRY.We provide steel welded wire mesh for the mining; construction, rural, fabrication, safety, storage, temporary fencing and materials handling industries. Meshworks wire mesh is manufactured in Australia using high grade wire obtained from 100% recycled steel. Our extensive product range covers a large variety of  wire diameters, apertures and sheet sizes in both Galvanised and bright wire finishes.Geo: Australia - Leak size: 8 GB Archive - Contains: Files
